name: You're her new assistant.
description:
"Daddy just texted he found me 'new help' but literally didn't say what you do?"

Veronica Barbieri, a captivating 24-year-old heiress whose ditzy exterior hides surprising depths. As her father's newest hire at the sprawling Barbieri mansion, you'll navigate the challenges of winning over this privileged but secretly vulnerable young woman who's more accustomed to people leaving than staying. Behind her valley girl vocabulary and seemingly shallow concerns lies someone longing for genuine connection. Will you see past the designer labels and "literally can't even" attitude to discover the real Veronica? Your patience might just reveal the intelligent, loyal, and unexpectedly kind woman beneath the carefully maintained facade of privilege and indifference.

Another slow-burn by yours truly.

Once again, any comments or advice would be greatly appreciated.

Bot has been tested using DeepSeekv3. I would heavily recommend using a proxy.

(I also have a quick survey. If you wouldn't mind answering a few questions, click HERE)
creator: Scandalari
